ddls:
CREATE TABLE "population_stats" (
  "stat_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each statistical entry */,
  "footnote" TEXT /* Additional information or context about the data */,
  "year" INTEGER /* Year the data pertains to */,
  "origin_country_code" TEXT /* ISO code for the country of origin */,
  "asylum_country_code" TEXT /* ISO code for the country of asylum */,
  "population_type" TEXT /* Type of population (e.g., IDP, REF, STA) */,
  "population_age_group" TEXT /* Age group of the population (e.g., 0-14, 15-64, 65+) */,
  "population_gender" TEXT /* Gender of the population (e.g., male, female, other) */,
  "source_url" TEXT /* URL of the original data source */,
  "data_quality_flags" TEXT /* Flags indicating potential data quality issues */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("stat_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_population_stats_origin_country_code FOREIGN KEY ("origin_country_code") REFERENCES countries ("country_code"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_population_stats_asylum_country_code FOREIGN KEY ("asylum_country_code") REFERENCES countries ("country_code"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_population_stats_population_type FOREIGN KEY ("population_type") REFERENCES population_types ("population_type_code")
)

CREATE TABLE "countries" (
  "country_code" TEXT /* ISO code for the country */,
  "country_name" TEXT /* Name of the country */,
  "region" TEXT /* Regional grouping of the country (e.g., Africa, Asia) */,
  "sub_region" TEXT /* Sub-regional grouping of the country (e.g., Eastern Africa, South Asia) */,
  "latitude" TEXT /* Latitude of the country */,
  "longitude" TEXT /* Longitude of the country */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("country_code")
)

CREATE TABLE "population_types" (
  "population_type_code" TEXT /* Code for the type of population */,
  "population_type_name" TEXT /* Name of the population type */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the population type */,
  "definition" TEXT /* Formal definition of the population type */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("population_type_code")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_sources" (
  "source_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each data source */,
  "source_name" TEXT /* Name of the organization or entity providing the data */,
  "contact_info" TEXT /* Contact information for the data source */,
  "organization_type" TEXT /* Type of organization providing the data (e.g., government, NGO, international organization) */,
  "url" TEXT /* URL of the data source */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("source_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_entries" (
  "entry_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each data entry */,
  "stat_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the statistical data */,
  "source_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the data source */,
  "entry_date" TEXT /* Date the data entry was recorded */,
  "data_collection_method" TEXT /* Method used to collect the data (e.g., survey, administrative records, estimation) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("entry_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_entries_stat_id FOREIGN KEY ("stat_id") REFERENCES population_stats ("stat_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_entries_source_id FOREIGN KEY ("source_id") REFERENCES data_sources ("source_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "population_counts" (
  "count_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each population count */,
  "stat_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the statistical data */,
  "population_count" INTEGER /* Number of individuals in the population */,
  "date_reported" TEXT /* Date the count was reported */,
  "count_type" TEXT /* Type of count (e.g., estimated, registered, reported) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("count_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_population_counts_stat_id FOREIGN KEY ("stat_id") REFERENCES population_stats ("stat_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., researcher, analyst, admin) */,
  "organization" TEXT /* Organization the user belongs to */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "log_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access log */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the user accessing the data */,
  "stat_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the statistical data being accessed */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the data was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, download) */,
  "reason_for_access" TEXT /* Reason for accessing the data (e.g., research, policy-making, reporting) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("log_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_stat_id FOREIGN KEY ("stat_id") REFERENCES population_stats ("stat_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "reports" (
  "report_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each report */,
  "title" TEXT /* Title of the report */,
  "content" TEXT /* Content of the report */,
  "author_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the author of the report */,
  "publish_date" TEXT /* Date the report was published */,
  "report_type" TEXT /* Type of report (e.g., annual report, thematic report) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("report_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_reports_author_id FOREIGN KEY ("author_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "report_access" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each report access */,
  "report_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the report being accessed */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the user accessing the report */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the report was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, download) */,
  "reason_for_access" TEXT /* Reason for accessing the report (e.g., research, policy-making, reporting) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_report_access_report_id FOREIGN KEY ("report_id") REFERENCES reports ("report_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_report_access_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_quality" (
  "quality_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each data quality issue */,
  "stat_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the statistical data */,
  "issue_type" TEXT /* Type of data quality issue (e.g., missing data, inconsistent data, outdated data) */,
  "issue_description" TEXT /* Description of the data quality issue */,
  "resolution_status" TEXT /* Status of resolving the data quality issue (e.g., open, in progress, resolved) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("quality_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_quality_stat_id FOREIGN KEY ("stat_id") REFERENCES population_stats ("stat_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "population_disaggregations" (
  "disaggregation_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each population disaggregation */,
  "stat_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the statistical data */,
  "category" TEXT /* Category of disaggregation (e.g., age group, gender, disability status) */,
  "value" INTEGER /* Value of the population in the category */,
  "category_type" TEXT /* Type of category (e.g., age group, gender, disability status) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("disaggregation_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_population_disaggregations_stat_id FOREIGN KEY ("stat_id") REFERENCES population_stats ("stat_id")
)
